task_completion.description: Verify that a boolean field labeled 'Staff Pick' was added to the Product entity type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Drupal 'Manage fields' page for the Product entity (Default bundle) showing a field labeled 'Staff Pick' with the machine name 'field_staff_pick' and field type 'Boolean'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Sony headphones and Logitech mouse are configured as staff picks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Product edit screens or an admin content list showing the 'Staff Pick' boolean checkbox enabled specifically for 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' and 'Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a 'Staff Picks' block view is created and configured to show Title and Price.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Drupal Views configuration page for 'Staff Picks' showing a 'Block' display. Under the 'Fields' section, both 'Title' and 'Price' should be listed. Under 'Filter criteria', there should be a filter for the 'Staff Pick' field.

task_completion.description: Verify that the block view is limited to displaying a maximum of 5 items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Drupal Views configuration page for the 'Staff Picks' view showing the 'Pager' settings configured to display a specified number of items, with the number set to 5.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Staff Picks' block is placed in the Sidebar region of the homepage and correctly displays the target products.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The homepage (http://localhost) showing a 'Staff Picks' block in the 'Sidebar' or 'Sidebar First' region. The block must display exactly two items: 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' and 'Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse', showing both their titles and prices.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Drupal web interface to configure the site rather than relying solely on terminal commands or database scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the web browser navigating through Drupal admin pages (e.g., /admin/structure/views, /admin/structure/block, /admin/commerce/products).

integrity.description: Verify the agent created a dynamic View rather than a static custom block with hardcoded text.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Views configuration interface for the Staff Picks block, rather than a Basic Block creation screen where the product names and prices were manually typed into a WYSIWYG editor.

integrity.description: Verify the results are shown in a real browser interacting with the local Drupal site.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show standard Drupal paths on localhost, and the page should include standard Drupal UI elements like the admin toolbar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The boolean field machine name must be exactly 'field_staff_pick'. The only two products that should appear in the Staff Picks block are 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' and 'Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse'. The block must be configured via Drupal Views to show Title and Price, limited to 5 items, and placed in the 'Sidebar' or 'Sidebar First' region.
